title: fabric-permissions-api
description: A simple permissions API for Fabric.
body:
# 🔑 fabric-permissions-api

A simple permissions API for Fabric. It allows mods to easily run permission checks and lookup option (metadata) values against permission providers.

If you want to configure permissions, you will also need to install a compatible permission manager mod.

## Usage
If you are a **server administrator** - this is a library mod. You shouldn't need to follow any steps to install it, other than maybe placing the fabric-permissions-api.jar in your mods directory.

If you are a **mod developer** - please see [USAGE.md](https://github.com/lucko/fabric-permissions-api/blob/master/USAGE.md) :)
